rationale: For high-end B2B real estate agents, the UI must feel like a premium metal credit card. Dark monochrome conveys authority, exclusivity, and focus. We reject flat grays in favor of deep obsidian and multi-layered glassmorphism to create depth. No purple, no pink, no emojis. Just raw volume, crisp edges, and smooth physics.

headings.description: Premium, structural, and modern. Replaces generic sans. Gives the app a high-end editorial tech feel.

body.description: Clean, highly legible geometric sans for data, standard text, and microcopy.

background.description: Deep obsidian tones. NOT flat gray. Layers of darkness create physical volume. Background is near OLED black to make glassmorphism pop.

accents.description: Monochrome with stark, high-contrast functional accents (Apple Health/Revolut vibe). Only use colors for data/states, never for decoration.

hero_greeting.title: Interactive 'Bonjour {Prénom}' Hero
hero_greeting.css_classes: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white flex justify-between items-end
hero_greeting.interaction: The entire greeting block acts as a trigger. Tap scales it down (scale: 0.98) and opens a right-side drawer or sleek dropdown with Profile/Settings/Plan. Includes a circular avatar.

progress_rings.title: SVG Animated Activity Rings (Reminders & Notes)
progress_rings.layout: Bento grid mode. Two square cards side-by-side (col-span-1 each).
progress_rings.implementation_details: Use pure SVG <circle>. Base track stroke: rgba(255,255,255,0.08). Progress track stroke: solid pure color with a subtle drop-shadow filter (e.g., drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(50,215,75,0.4))). Add stroke-dasharray and stroke-dashoffset for the fill animation. stroke-linecap: round.
progress_rings.visuals: Reminders Ring: #32D74B. Notes Ring: #0A84FF. Inside the ring: Large numbers (e.g. '5/10') in Cabinet Grotesk. Below the ring: small uppercase tracking-widest text (e.g. 'RAPPELS', 'NOTES').
progress_rings.container_style: bg-[#121214] rounded-3xl p-5 border border-white/5 relative overflow-hidden. Add an absolute radial-gradient glow in the top-left corner matching the ring color at 5% opacity for depth.

bottom_nav.title: Floating iOS Premium Nav
bottom_nav.css_classes: fixed bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 flex items-center gap-1 p-1.5 rounded-full z-50
bottom_nav.styling: Heavy glassmorphism base (bg-black/60, blur-2xl), 1px top inner border (white/15). Total width max 90vw.
bottom_nav.items: Width 60px, height 52px, flex flex-col justify-center items-center rounded-full transition-all duration-300. Unselected: text-white/40. Selected: text-white, background rgba(255,255,255,0.12).
bottom_nav.typography: Labels are optional, but if used: 10px font-medium mt-1. Better to rely on clear 24px icons (Phosphor or Lucide).
bottom_nav.center_fab: A prominent central action button ('Ask KOLO'). It should break the pill slightly. bg-white text-black rounded-full h-14 w-14 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(255,255,255,0.25)] flex items-center justify-center -translate-y-2.

onboarding_chips.title: Clickable Select Chips (Replaces inputs)
onboarding_chips.inactive_state: bg-[#1A1A1C] border border-white/10 text-white/60 px-5 py-3 rounded-full text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer
onboarding_chips.active_state: bg-white text-black border-transparent shadow-[0_0_16px_rgba(255,255,255,0.2)] scale-[1.02] cursor-pointer

header.title: App Header
header.layout: flex justify-between items-center px-6 pt-safe pb-4 bg-transparent
header.elements: Left: Burger menu icon (text-white). Center: Logo image. Right: Notification Bell with a pure red (#FF453A) 8px notification dot with animate-pulse.

logos.description: White 'K' with transparent background. Clean cut, high contrast. Use this as the main header logo (height: 28px, object-fit: contain) to avoid the 'dirty borders' issue.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. e.g., data-testid='nav-home-tab', data-testid='hero-profile-trigger', data-testid='onboarding-chip-crm'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Migrate all existing gray backgrounds in v2.css and JS components to the deep obsidian palette defined in this blueprint.
Remove all references to the old comma-separated text inputs in V2OnboardingPage.js and replace them with the flex-wrap Clickable Select Chips.

Implement the SVG Circular Rings in V2HomePage.js. Do not use generic Shadcn/UI or flat HTML progress bars. Build them using pure SVG <circle> tags with stroke-dasharray and CSS transitions for the fill effect, adding the drop-shadow for volume.

Update V2Layout.js to include the floating bottom nav. Ensure the bottom nav is explicitly fixed at the bottom, uses backdrop-filter for glassmorphism, and handles iOS safe areas (env(safe-area-inset-bottom)). Implement the center FAB properly.
Make the 'Bonjour {Prénom}' hero fully interactive, wrapping it in a touch target (button) that triggers the right-side profile drawer.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all new interactive components.
